titleStmt.title: SII 16.104: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 104. (A.R. No. 340 of 1926.) KANAGĀNIPALLE, DHARMAVARAM TALUK, ANANTAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a stone set up in a street in the village.
This is dated Śaka 1455, Vijaya, Vaiśākha śu. 13, corresponding to 1533 A.D., May 6, (Tuesday).

It records an order of Īśvarayya, the agent of Vākiṭi Timmappa-nāyaka, exempting the artisan caste (pañchāḷamvāru) from payment of all the taxes in the thirty-two villages as of old, in order to rehabilitate them in their former places from which they had migrated to Kundṛipi-sīma and Pākāla-sīma when these taxes were imposed on them in the time of Timmappa-Nāyuḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti śrījayābhyudaya
śālivāhana śakavarṣaṁbulu 1455 A
gunēṭi vijaya saṁvatsaraṁ vaiśāka śuddha 1?7
lu śrīma(ṁ)Nmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīra
pratāpa Acyutarāyamahārāyalu pṛdhvīrājyaṁ
yēlutuvuṁḍagānu vākiṭi tiṁmappanāyanivāri kā
ryyakarttalayina yīśvarayyagāri nirūpa pramāṇāna kana
gānipalli bhūmireḍḍi ceṁnnamareḍḍi karaṇaṁ hoṁnaya parva
tarāju basavaya [Ayyaparsu]nāgaya mukhyamaina mu
pairaṁḍu grāmāla raḍḍikaraṇāluṁnu kanugānipa
lli yi jyāti paṁcāḷaṁvārikiṁni mupairaṁḍu The word paṁcāḷamuvāru may stand for paṁcāṇamuvāru .
grāmāla paṁcāḷaṁvārikiṁnni yiccina śāsanakramameṭlaṁ
mīru kritamu prākukālamaṁdu tējōpārdhanai kāṇa
yālu veṭi vēmulu yēmilēka naḍavagānu tiṁmappanā
kālamaṁddu nēmu Avanāyamu cēsikoṁna kāṇika sarva
Aravāsikāṇiki daṁḍuga drōhulu konagānu tiṁmapa
māla paṁcāḷaṁvāru sīmaviḍici kuṁdṛpisīma pākāla
sīmalaku mīru pōgānu mupai reṁḍu grāmāla reḍḍikara
ṇāluvacci mīcēta Avanāyamu cēsikoṁna reṁḍu kā
mīku muṁddara nēmu naḍapukone kaṭṭu
ḍi cēsikōru mīku pūrvāna
vanāyimulu The slab is broken here and the
Digital edition of SII 16.104 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
